title: ailanthus altissima f. rubra
intro: Ailanthus altissima f. rubra, also known as Red Chinese Tree of Heaven, is a cultivar of the Ailanthus altissima tree, native to China and widely cultivated in other parts of the world for its ornamental value and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ailanthus altissima f. rubra include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve wound healing. Ailanthus altissima f. rubra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
